panels.title: Core Web Vitals — p75 Over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time, quantile(0.75)(metric_value) AS "LCP (s)" FROM web_vitals WHERE metric_name = 'LCP' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL ${__interval} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time, quantile(0.75)(metric_value) AS "CLS" FROM web_vitals WHERE metric_name = 'CLS' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL ${__interval} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time, quantile(0.75)(metric_value) AS "INP (ms)" FROM web_vitals WHERE metric_name = 'INP' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL ${__interval} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT device_type AS "Device", metric_name AS "Metric", round(quantile(0.75)(metric_value), 3) AS "p75", round(quantile(0.95)(metric_value), 3) AS "p95", count() AS "Samples" FROM web_vitals WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY device_type, metric_name ORDER BY device_type, metric_name
SELECT toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time, count() AS "Samples" FROM web_vitals WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL ${__interval} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT rating AS "Rating", count() AS "Count" FROM web_vitals WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating

SELECT page_path AS "Page", round(quantile(0.75)(metric_value), 2) AS "LCP p75 (s)", round(quantile(0.95)(metric_value), 2) AS "LCP p95 (s)", count() AS "Samples" FROM web_vitals WHERE metric_name = 'LCP' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY page_path ORDER BY "LCP p75 (s)" DESC LIMIT 10
